name: Spam Stuffed Potatoes Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
1 package Frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry (10 oz)
6 Baking potatoes, baked and kept warm
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a shallow rectangular 2-quart baking dish with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a large nonstick skillet, sauté SPAM in butter for 3 minutes.
4. Add onion, spinach, and thyme; cook and stir for 2 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and set aside.
6. Cut a thin slice off the top of each potato.
7. Scoop out each potato, leaving a 1/2-inch shell.
8. Place shells in the prepared baking dish.
9. Place scooped-out potatoes in a medium mixing bowl.
10. Beat at medium speed for 30 seconds.
11. Add milk, Parmesan cheese, and pepper; beat just until combined.
12. Stir in the SPAM mixture.
13. Fill potato shells with the potato mixture.
14. Bake, uncovered, for 25-30 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
15. Top with cheeses.
16. Bake for an additional 5 minutes or until cheese is melted.
